description: Cute-as-a-button, this bag in powder pink from kiara has chain straps and chain edging.  Roomy and comfortable to carry, the leather effect fabric will give a sophisticated look to any outfit. Height: 21 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 7 cmMade of synthetic leather for durabilityHas a front flap fastened with a magnet with one main zipped compartment with internal zipped pocket and organiser pocketsTwo long chain handles for carrying easeZipped pocket on backCute shape with chains woven into edges of bag on back and frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
